/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/simpleray.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simpleray.dir/src/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simpleray.dir/src/GameObject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simpleray.dir/src/LightSource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simpleray.dir/src/Quaternion.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simpleray.dir/src/RayTracer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simpleray.dir/src/Scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simpleray.dir/src/Sphere.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simpleray.dir/src/Vector3.cpp.o -o simpleray  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib -framework OpenGL
